name: photoshop
description: Connect Artyx to a Photoshop UXP MCP bridge for layer inspection, edits, adjustments, and export workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect and edit Photoshop layers, adjustments, and exports.
interface.longDescription: Drive Photoshop through a UXP MCP bridge: read the layer stack, apply edits and adjustments, and run export workflows, with the read-before-write discipline that keeps a document intact.
defaultPrompt: Open the active Photoshop document, list its layers, and boost the contrast on the top layer.

companion.title: Finish setup inside Photoshop
steps: Install the Photoshop UXP MCP plugin and enable it in Plugins.
Start the bridge from the plugin panel.
